name: Oriental BBQ Suce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together ketchup, corn syrup, soy sauce, garlic, anise seed, cinnamon, pepper and cloves until well blended.
2. Brush the mixture onto chicken, pork chops, spare ribs or steak during the last 20 minutes of grilling.
3. Turn the grill off and baste frequently with the sauce while cooking.
